_comment: Bladesinger guild layer for 3s, migrated from the
v6 per-port format. See 3s/guilds/vikings.json for the
full section reference. Corpse/blur/plate triggers + combat
gags moved here from characters/din.json (2026-06-14) - shared
din.json is used by 3s-Din and 3k-Din, so both blade layers
carry them. Tweak for 3s vs 3k command differences as needed.

triggers._note: mw finished repairing a damaged weapon -> safe to revalrie. noparty so a party bladesinger never revalries (matches the kill-trigger policy). Resume gate then waits for 'Fully refreshed you end your revalrie.'

triggers.pattern: Sorry but you have no weapons that you can maintain.
triggers._note: weapon needed no maintenance (nobreak/undamaged) -> mw is a no-op, revalrie immediately. Same noparty + resume-gate flow as the completion case.

triggers.pattern: As you hand the trader the plate
The reflective shadow surrounding you disintegrates into nothingness
Robertson says: If Ford really did send you,
an angelic temptress standing before you.

gags: Casting this spell would not benefit you at this time.
Your reflective shadow causes your foe to be disoriented.
Your evade2 strategy forces you to: rejuvenate

mip_required.hint: Blur/Portal display needs B:/P: in the hpbar

settings._post_kill_resume_note: After a kill the kill-trigger casts revalrie; every bot engine (Bot/Hunt/Run) then HOLDS until this text arrives or the timeout. VERIFY the exact wording with #log - if it's wrong the bot pauses the full timeout after each kill.
settings.post_kill_resume_text: Fully refreshed you end your revalrie.
settings._post_kill_resume_timeout_note: Raised 20->40 (2026-06-16): the hold now spans mw maintenance (async, several rounds on a breakable weapon) THEN revalrie, so 20s could resume mid-buff. Tune down if maintenance is always quick.
settings._blur_auto_note: Auto-blur (Toggle 'blur'). Each reset gives `max` blur charges (Din: 8) and unused charges are WASTED at refill (lost GXP + defense). Rule: while still at MAX charges, once reset% reaches the threshold, fire ONE blur; the 'disintegrates into nothingness'->blur trigger chains the rest until charges run out, finishing just before the reset refills. Threshold is auto-derived: 100*(1 - max*blur_duration_secs/blur_reset_secs) - blur_auto_margin_pct. blur_reset_secs (~2700) and blur_duration_secs both SELF-MEASURE from the streaming B:n/m (pct) field (duration = wall time between charge drops while fighting), so the first cycle after a relog may not fire until they're learned. Override anytime: set blur_auto_pct>0 for a fixed reset%, or blur_duration_secs to seed the per-charge time. Shown in the blur pane as 'auto@NN%'.
